_note: A curated, firm-agnostic taxonomy of legal-drafting clause FUNCTIONS. A block's `function` field SHOULD be one of these labels so blocks are indexable by role across document types. This is the coarse functional taxonomy (recurring, reusable roles) — not a per-document-section enumeration. Descriptions are generic; they name no firm and cite no proprietary source. A private pack MAY extend this taxonomy with its own labels.

functions.preamble: Opening recital naming the instrument, its date, and its parties.
functions.recital: Background 'WHEREAS' statements establishing context and intent.
functions.definitions: Defined-term section fixing the meaning of capitalized terms.
functions.granting_clause: Operative words of grant, conveyance, transfer, or appointment.
functions.operative_provision: Core substantive terms stating what the parties agree or direct.
functions.property_description: Legal description of real or personal property at issue.
functions.consideration: Statement of the consideration exchanged by the parties.
functions.representations_warranties: Party representations and warranties of fact.
functions.covenants: Affirmative or negative promises of future conduct.
functions.conditions: Conditions precedent or subsequent gating an obligation.
functions.indemnification: Allocation of liability and duty to hold harmless.
functions.confidentiality: Restrictions on use and disclosure of confidential information.
functions.warranty: Express or limited warranty and any disclaimer of warranties.
functions.disclaimer: Disclaimer of representations, warranties, or reliance.
functions.term_termination: Duration of the instrument and grounds/effects of termination.
functions.remedies: Remedies, default provisions, and limitations of liability.
functions.notice: Notice terms: how and where formal notice must be given.
functions.notice_body: The substantive content of a statutory or contractual notice.
functions.deadline_notice: A notice keyed to a statutory or court-ordered deadline.
functions.forum_dispute_resolution: Venue, jurisdiction, arbitration, or mediation terms.
functions.severability: Clause preserving the instrument if a provision is invalid.
functions.amendment_waiver: How the instrument may be amended or a term waived.
functions.assignment: Whether and how rights or duties may be assigned.
functions.court_caption: Case caption / court heading for a pleading or motion.
functions.affidavit_statements: Numbered sworn statements of fact in an affidavit.
functions.attestation: Attestation clause for witnesses to an instrument.
functions.certificate_of_service: Certificate that a paper was served on the parties.
functions.discovery_request: A request in a discovery instrument (interrogatory, RFP, RFA).
functions.trust_powers: Enumerated powers granted to a trustee or fiduciary.
functions.signature_block: Party signature lines and execution block.
functions.notary_acknowledgment: Acknowledgment form of a notarial certificate.
functions.jurat: Jurat form of a notarial certificate (sworn-before-me).
